caption: A man wearing a black t-shirt, a black baseball cap with a logo, and over-ear headphones speaks into a professional microphone in a studio setting. He wears a gold chain around his neck and a gold bracelet on his right wrist. To his left, a white wall features a repeating logo with the word "HUSTLE" and stars. Behind him, a dark backdrop displays the text "BOSS TALK 101". Two graphics are overlaid on the screen: one on the left reads "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" and another on the right reads "BOSS TALK 101". As the sequence progresses, the man gestures with his right hand, moving it toward his chest and pointing toward the microphone. He remains seated in the same position, speaking while maintaining a focused expression throughout the clip.
